text: Here I am, immersed in a space that radiates intention and design—a corridor leading into an exhibition devoted to research and development. The glass walls and reflecting surfaces create boundaries both physical and philosophical, prompting reflections on transparency, innovation, and the endless pursuit of knowledge. I feel curious, somewhat dwarfed by the cleanliness and possibility, with a sense of entering a liminal realm where the future is not only discussed but enacted. The presence of safety equipment grounds me in the practical, even as my thoughts drift into abstraction.
